# AI Coding Instructions

This repository uses the Cursor rules entry at [`.cursor/rules/index.md`](../.cursor/rules/index.md) as the single source of truth for AI coding guidance.

Before generating code, modifying files, or giving implementation advice, load and follow:

- [`.cursor/README.md`](../.cursor/README.md) for the Cursor configuration overview
- [`.cursor/rules/index.md`](../.cursor/rules/index.md) for the actual project rules and referenced sub-rules

If any instruction here conflicts with the Cursor rules entry or its referenced rule files, the Cursor rules entry wins.
